g.text: iCopilot — terminal-native agentic CLI powered by GitHub Models
-p, --prompt <text> one-shot mode: run a single prompt and exit
--local use the default local OpenAI-compatible provider (ollama)
--provider <name> model provider name (github, ollama, vllm, lmstudio, openai, anthropic, or a custom
--base-url <url> override the provider base URL for OpenAI-compatible endpoints
-q, --quiet suppress banners and decorative terminal output
--browser [port] start the HTTP API server and open browser UI
hook [subcommand] [args...] manage the git pre-commit hook
